title: Assistant Store Manager - Tupperware India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Tupperware India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Tupperware India are looking for an experienced Assistant Store Manager based out of Bhopal. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Tupperware India:
Tupperware India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tupperware India!
